if 1:
            import sys
            class AtExit:
                is_finalizing = sys.is_finalizing
                print = print
                def __del__(self):
                    self.print(self.is_finalizing(), flush=True)
            # Keep a reference in the __main__ module namespace, so the
            # AtExit destructor will be called at Python exit
            ref = AtExit()
        rJ
